channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Forgotten organ may predict lifespan
item.description: A previously overlooked organ could offer clues to aging and cancer survival, according to AI analysis of CT scans.

item.title: NASA's Roman telescope could find 100,000 exoplanets
item.description: The Roman Space Telescope may discover about 100,000 exoplanets, surpassing all previous missions combined.

item.title: Hubble captures M88 on a perilous journey that could change it forever
item.description: A stunning spiral galaxy called Messier 88 is racing through the crowded Virgo Cluster on a journey that will dramatically reshape its future. At its ...

item.title: Scientists discover inherited traits that break Mendelâs Laws of genetics
item.description: A major mouse study found that some inherited traits are passed down through epigenetic changes that break the classic rules of genetics. Researchers ...
